name: Devil's Fridgecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the gelatin, cold water, and instant coffee in a small saucepan.
2. Let sit for one minute until the gelatin is softened.
3. Heat gently over very low heat until the gelatin melts. Remove from heat and set aside.
4. In another bowl, beat the instant pudding mix, salt, and cold milk until blended well.
5. Stir in the gelatin mixture and mix well.
6. Cut the pound cake into cubes (freeze the rest).
7. Place half the cake cubes in a single layer at the bottom of a loaf pan.
8. Pour half the pudding mixture over the cake cubes.
9. Add a layer of the remaining cake cubes, then pour on the remaining pudding.
10. Chill several hours until set.
11. To serve, cut into thin slices and serve from the pan.
Makes 10 servings, about 150 calories each.
